headline: What Moderna (MRNA)'s Expedited Flu Vaccine Review And Institutional Support Means For Shareholders
summary: Moderna, Inc. recently participated in the 5th LNP Formulation & Process Development Summit in Boston and scheduled a May 1, 2026 webcast to discuss its first-quarter 2026 results and corporate update, while its flu vaccine remains under expedited FDA review with a decision expected in August. Investor attention has been reinforced by this accelerated regulatory process for Moderna’s flu candidate and by increased positions from large institutional shareholders such as Fidelity and BNP...
